lines.text: Welcome to the Wizard School, Heena! Here, magic isn't just coding—it's actual wizardry. Look at the floating candles and moving portraits!
Oh wow, are those candles floating? And I just saw a flying owl pass by! This is incredible!
Indeed! But the spell door is locked. Gather the 6 glowing mana crystals around the room so we can brew our stabilizing potion!
Look around the spell libraries and potion desks. The mana crystals shine with a deep purple wizard glow!
Excellent! The potion is mixed, the spell door traced open, and the portal to the Developer Dungeon is active. Proceed when you are ready!
Step into the magical portal when you are ready to head over to the Developer Dungeon.
